apply-pkcs7-detached-signature-to-pdf.title: Apply PKCS#7 Detached Signature to PDF
apply-pkcs7-detached-signature-to-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF from a file stream, adds a signature field, and applies a PKCS#7 detached digital signature using a PFX certificate, then saves the signed document.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate and Timestamp
batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, add a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate, and optionally timestamp the signature with a TSA.

encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using AES‑256, and disable all permissions including printing, then save the protected file.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and High‑Resolution Printing
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting an owner password, allowing high‑resolution printing, and restricting content copying.

decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, decrypting it, and saving the unprotected file with Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction.title: Set PDF Privileges to Disable Extraction and Form Filling
set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction.description: Shows how to encrypt a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf and restrict permissions so that content extraction and form filling are disabled, allowing only printing.

add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to PDF Second Page
add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a visible signature field on the bottom‑right corner of the second page, signs it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and saves the signed document.

apply-invisible-digital-signature-with-t.title: Apply Invisible Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
apply-invisible-digital-signature-with-t.description: Demonstrates adding an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature that records the signing time while preserving the original PDF layout using incremental updates.

validate-pdf-signature-certificate.title: Validate PDF Signature and Retrieve Signing Certificate
validate-pdf-signature-certificate.description: Loads a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature using strict validation, and extracts the signing certificate details via Aspose.Pdf's validation result or the signature object.

extract-signature-field-metadata.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
extract-signature-field-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through form fields, detect signature fields, and retrieve both field and signature details for auditing purposes.

extract-embedded-images-from-signed-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Images from Signed PDF
extract-embedded-images-from-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and save all embedded images as PNG files.

remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF (When Allowed)
remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enable signature sanitization, and save it to produce an unsigned PDF if the document's permissions permit.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate
sign-pdf-with-smart-card.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a signature field, retrieving a certificate from a smart card, and signing the document using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card__v2.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate (No PIN Prompt)
sign-pdf-with-smart-card__v2.description: Shows how to sign a PDF using a certificate stored on a smart card with Aspose.Pdf, leveraging ExternalSignature to avoid a PIN prompt.

custom-security-handler-logging-pdf-acce.title: Custom Security Handler Logging PDF Access
custom-security-handler-logging-pdf-acce.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs encryption and decryption operations, then encrypts and opens a PDF using this handler.

sign-pdf-with-timestamp.title: Sign PDF with Timestamp from TSA
sign-pdf-with-timestamp.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, create a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, configure timestamp settings from a trusted TSA server, and save the signed document.

validate-pkcs7-detached-signature.title: Validate PKCS#7 Detached Signature and Certificate Chain
validate-pkcs7-detached-signature.description: Shows how to load a PDF, find signature fields, extract a PKCS#7 detached signature, and verify it while checking the certificate chain using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-digital-signature-ocsp.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Using OCSP
validate-pdf-digital-signature-ocsp.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, locate the first signature field, and verify the signature with OCSP revocation checking using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature-crl.title: Validate PDF Signature Using CRL Revocation Checks
validate-pdf-signature-crl.description: Loads a signed PDF, configures validation to use CRL distribution points in strict mode, and verifies each signature field's revocation status.

extract-signing-time-from-pdf-signature.title: Extract Signing Time from PDF Signature and Convert to UTC
extract-signing-time-from-pdf-signature.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates over signature fields, retrieves the signing time from each signature, and converts it to UTC in ISO‑8601 format.

extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature
extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.description: Demonstrates loading a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting the X509 certificate from each signature field, building its certificate chain, and saving each certificate as a DER file.

sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact Info, and Location
sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate while populating the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location metadata fields.

sign-pdf-with-visible-image-signature.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Signature
sign-pdf-with-visible-image-signature.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a signature field with a custom image as the visible appearance, and signing it using a PKCS#1 certificate.

certify-pdf-no-changes.title: Certify PDF with No-Changes Permission
certify-pdf-no-changes.description: Shows how to apply a certification signature to a PDF that disallows any further modifications using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

certify-pdf-append-only-signature.title: Certify PDF with Append-Only Signature to Allow Adding Pages
certify-pdf-append-only-signature.description: Shows how to create a DocMDP certification signature using Aspose.Pdf, set the document to append‑only mode, and save the PDF so that new pages can be added after signing.

sign-pdf-lock-specific-form-fields.title: Sign PDF and Lock Specific Form Fields
sign-pdf-lock-specific-form-fields.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature, and setting selected form fields to read‑only in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

lock-pdf-with-digital-signature.title: Lock PDF with Digital Signature (MDP)
lock-pdf-with-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates applying a certification (MDP) signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, which locks the document in read‑only mode after signing.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption, define user and owner passwords, set permissions, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-bit.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-bit.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply RC4 128‑bit encryption with user and owner passwords, limit permissions to printing and content extraction, and save the encrypted document.

decrypt-pdf-extract-embedded-images.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Embedded Images
decrypt-pdf-extract-embedded-images.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypt it, and extract all images from each page using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.description: The example demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, removing its encryption, modifying metadata such as title, author, and subject, and saving the updated document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.description: The example iterates through all PDF files in a folder, derives a password from each file name, encrypts each document with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the encrypted copies to an output folder.

batch-decrypt-pdf-lookup-table.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
batch-decrypt-pdf-lookup-table.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in a folder by using a dictionary that maps file names to their passwords, leveraging Aspose.Pdf's Document class.

batch-sign-pdfs-using-metadata.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document Metadata
batch-sign-pdfs-using-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, read a metadata value (Title) to choose a certificate, and apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-unique-visible-sign.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Unique Visible Signature Image
batch-sign-pdfs-with-unique-visible-sign.description: The example iterates through PDF files in a folder, adds a signature field to each document, and signs it using a PKCS#1 certificate while applying a document‑specific PNG image as the visible signature appearance.

batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt and Sign PDFs
batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-signature-field-names-and-page-n.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from PDF
extract-signature-field-names-and-page-n.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, checks for form fields, iterates through them to find signature fields, and prints each field's full name together with the page number it appears on.

list-signature-field-object-ids.title: List Signature Field Object IDs in PDF
list-signature-field-object-ids.description: Shows how to enumerate signature fields in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and obtain their low‑level COS dictionary object IDs using reflection.

retrieve-signature-reason-location.title: Retrieve Reason and Location from PDF Signatures
retrieve-signature-reason-location.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its signature fields, and read the Reason and Location metadata stored in each digital signature.

compute-verify-pdf-hash-before-after-sig.title: Compute and Verify PDF Hash Before and After Signing
compute-verify-pdf-hash-before-after-sig.description: Demonstrates how to calculate a SHA‑256 hash of a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 detached signature, extract the signed ByteRange, and compare hashes to ensure document integrity.

encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as an attachment, encrypt the PDF with user/owner passwords, add a signature field, and digitally sign the document using a PFX certificate.

sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF and embed custom XMP metadata that describes the signing details.

sign-pdf-with-custom-xml-signature.title: Sign PDF with Custom XML Signature using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-custom-xml-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and embed custom XML data via a custom signing delegate.

sign-pdf-lock-signature-field.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
sign-pdf-lock-signature-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate, lock the signature field, and enforce append‑only saving to prevent further modifications.

sign-pdf-append-only-signature.title: Sign PDF with Append‑Only Signature for Future Signatures
sign-pdf-append-only-signature.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature, and mark the PDF for incremental updates so additional signatures can be added later.

certify-pdf-prevent-further-signatures.title: Certify PDF with DocMDP and Prevent Further Signatures
certify-pdf-prevent-further-signatures.description: Shows how to apply a DocMDP certification signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, making the document read‑only and disallowing any additional signatures.

encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copying While Blocking Printing
encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.description: The example loads a PDF, encrypts it with user and owner passwords, sets permissions to allow content extraction (copying) but disables printing, and saves the encrypted file.

encrypt-pdf-allow-printing-copying.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Printing & Copying
encrypt-pdf-allow-printing-copying.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with user and owner passwords, while granting permissions for printing and content extraction (copying).

encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords, set permissions to allow only printing (disabling content extraction), and save the protected file using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-extract-images-reencrypt.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-extract-images-reencrypt.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypting it, extracting all embedded images to files, and then re‑encrypting the document with a new owner password and specific permissions.

download-sign-upload-pdf-azure-blob.title: Download PDF, Apply Digital Signature, and Upload to Azure Blob
download-sign-upload-pdf-azure-blob.description: The example downloads a PDF (or creates a blank one), adds a signature field, signs it with a PFX certificate, and uploads the signed document to Azure Blob Storage.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, encrypts it with a user password using AES‑256, and returns the encrypted PDF bytes.

sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.title: Sign PDF with Windows Certificate Store using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to locate a certificate by thumbprint in the CurrentUser store, create an ExternalSignature, add a visible signature field, and sign a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-hardware-token.title: Sign PDF with Hardware Token Certificate (PKCS#11)
sign-pdf-hardware-token.description: Demonstrates how to load a certificate from a hardware token and apply a digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature-trusted-root.title: Validate PDF Signature Against Trusted Root CA
validate-pdf-signature-trusted-root.description: Shows how to load a PDF and a trusted root certificate, configure strict validation options, and verify digital signatures using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.title: Validate PDF Signature and Verify Timestamp Within Certificate Validity
validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.description: Loads a signed PDF, validates each digital signature using strict validation, extracts the signing time, and checks that the timestamp falls inside the signer's certificate validity period.

extract-signature-image-to-png.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-signature-image-to-png.description: Loads a signed PDF, locates a specific signature field, extracts its appearance image, and writes the image to a PNG file.

extract-signature-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Signature Images from PDF
extract-signature-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate signature form fields, and extract their appearance images as JPEG files.

extract-images-per-page.title: Extract Images from Each Page of a Signed PDF
extract-images-per-page.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save every image found on each page into separate page‑specific folders.

extract-signature-certificate-chain-expi.title: Extract Signature Certificate Chain and Verify Expiration Dates
extract-signature-certificate-chain-expi.description: Loads a PDF, finds digital signature fields, extracts the attached X509 certificate, builds its trust chain, and reports the expiration status of each certificate in the chain.

custom-pdf-security-disable-copy-paste-w.title: Custom PDF Security with Disabled Copy‑Paste and Watermark
custom-pdf-security-disable-copy-paste-w.description: Demonstrates how to implement a simple custom security handler to disable copy‑paste via PDF permissions and add a visible warning overlay using a text stamp on each page.

sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then flatten the document so the signature visual cannot be altered.

sign-pdf-remove-annotations-preserve-sig.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations While Preserving the Signature
sign-pdf-remove-annotations-preserve-sig.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF, disable signature sanitization, delete every annotation except the signature field, and save the cleaned document.

encrypt-pdf-with-password.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-password.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting user and owner passwords, defining permissions, encrypting the document with AES‑256, and saving the protected file.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-edit-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-edit-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that viewing is unrestricted while editing requires an owner password, with specific permissions applied.

decrypt-pdf-multi-signature-re-sign.title: Decrypt PDF and Re‑sign Multiple Signature Fields with Different Certificates
decrypt-pdf-multi-signature-re-sign.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF using a password, extracts all signature fields, and re‑signs each field with a distinct certificate from PFX files, then saves the decrypted and signed document.

batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, add a visible digital signature using a PFX certificate, compress the signed documents by optimizing resources, and save the results.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-archive-zip.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
batch-encrypt-pdfs-archive-zip.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and then package the encrypted PDFs into a ZIP archive.

extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Digital Signatures
extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.description: Loads a PDF, finds signature fields, retrieves each signature's algorithm information, and logs the digest (hash) algorithm used.

sign-pdf-with-sha384-digest.title: Sign PDF with SHA-384 Digest Using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha384-digest.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a signature field, and apply a digital signature using a PFX certificate with the SHA‑384 digest algorithm.

sign-pdf-with-sha512.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑512 using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha512.description: Loads a PDF, adds a signature field, configures a PKCS#7 detached signature to use the SHA‑512 digest algorithm, and signs the document with a PFX certificate.

sign-pdf-with-rsa-private-key.title: Sign PDF with RSA Private Key using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-rsa-private-key.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and digitally sign it with a 4096‑bit RSA private key stored in a PFX file using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with an ECC P‑256 private key using Aspose.Pdf, creating a visible signature field and applying the signature.

encrypt-pdf-with-hsm-certificate.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate from HSM
encrypt-pdf-with-hsm-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a public certificate whose private key resides on a hardware security module or smart card, and set specific permissions for the encrypted document.

decrypt-pdf-certificate-hardware-token.title: Decrypt PDF Encrypted with Certificate Using Hardware Token
decrypt-pdf-certificate-hardware-token.description: Shows how to open a PDF that was encrypted with a public certificate and decrypt it by locating the matching private key stored on a hardware token or smart card in the current user's store.

batch-sign-pdfs-by-doc-type.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document-Type Certificates
batch-sign-pdfs-by-doc-type.description: Demonstrates how to sign multiple PDF files in a batch, selecting the appropriate X.509 certificate from a database (or file) based on each document's type metadata, using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-hashed-pass.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Hashed Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-hashed-pass.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from a SHA‑256 hash of its name and the current date.

extract-and-add-pdf-signature-field.title: Extract Existing Signature Fields and Add a New Empty Signature Field
extract-and-add-pdf-signature-field.description: The example loads a PDF, lists all existing signature form fields, creates a new empty signature field on the first page, and saves the updated document.

sign-pdf-embed-xfa-data.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XFA Data
sign-pdf-embed-xfa-data.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, assigning custom XFA form data, creating a digital signature field, signing the document with a PKCS#1 certificate, and saving the signed PDF.

validate-pdf-signature-list-san.title: Validate PDF Signature and List Certificate SANs
validate-pdf-signature-list-san.description: Opens a signed PDF, verifies each signature field, extracts the signing certificate and displays its Subject Alternative Name entries.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-password-rem.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords, Then Remove User Password
encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-password-rem.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords using AES‑256, then reopening it with the owner password to remove the user password while keeping the document encrypted and preserving permissions.

sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.description: Demonstrates adding a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, then flattening all form fields so they become part of the page content.

restrict-copy-paste-pdf-encryption.title: Restrict Copy‑Paste in PDF with Encryption
restrict-copy-paste-pdf-encryption.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply password protection, limit permissions to printing only, and save the secured document using Aspose.Pdf.
